history.notes: Major: 4 new modules (Paragraph, Email, Translator, Exercise with Tense/Flash/Vocab/Story sub-tabs, Timezone). Worker contract now matches NikGrammer-Agent — POST /api/chat with {messages,maxTokens}, GET /test endpoints. Scroll architecture rewritten — pages now scroll properly on mobile and desktop. Shared composer toolbar component (B/H/◐/👁/aA/📖/⧉ + 📎🎤✨🌐🗑▸) reused across all input modules.
Responsive design — desktop side-rail, multi-column home, two-pane settings. Worker proxy restored with mode toggle. Persistent Storage API with live usage.
Default language is now EN. No-key flow opens a friendly setup sheet. Welcome card shows SETUP button when no provider key is present.
Initial SmartApp release. Modular shell + JSON config. Chat module live.
